title: Wool to Dye
description: Wool to Dye is a datapack and mod for any version technically but I recommend 1.20+!
body:
# **INFORMATION**

## **What is Wool to Dye?**
Wool to Dye is a minecraft datapack that allows you to smelt wool in a furnace and out comes the wools dye type for example you smelt lime wool. It would turn into lime dye!

![Smelt Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0db8cc6e3f6cbd463ec85e68fe953c670bdfd66e.png)

## **Why is Wool to Dye a thing?**
Wool to Dye is a thing because, do you ever have a wool block around? From a sheep farm for example? This would be a great way to grind dyes! Especially white dye! Of course you would need the dye to make the sheep that color but this datapack is still great!

![Sheep farm example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc68a590fbb7c0431bd8606214e2e4ce79b81d52.jpeg)
